final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero banner, luxury fragrance campaign
Primary request: premium perfume bottle on black velvet with dramatic spotlight and scattered gold glitter, creating mysterious luxurious night atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: deep black velvet fabric surface, minimalist dark void background
Subject: elegant glass perfume bottle with refined silhouette, reflective surface catching light
Style/medium: high-end product photography, commercial beauty campaign
Composition/framing: centered product shot, top-down spotlight angle, shallow depth of field
Lighting/mood: single focused spotlight from above creating dramatic chiaroscuro, deep shadows and bright highlights, mysterious and opulent
Color palette: deep blacks, warm gold glitter accents, subtle reflections on glass
Materials/textures: soft black velvet pile, shimmering gold dust particles, smooth glass surface, liquid perfume inside
Constraints: keep perfume bottle as hero element with velvet texture clearly visible
Avoid: flat lighting, cluttered background, plastic-looking bottle, over-saturated colors, watermark
